# nios_security_tacacsplus_authservice (Resource)

Manages a Tacacsplus Authentication Service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// Create TACACS+ Authservice with Basic Fields
resource "nios_security_tacacsplus_authservice" "tacacsplus_authservice_with_basic_fields" {
  name = "tacacsplus_authservice1"
  servers = [
    {
      acct_port      = 1813
      address        = "2.2.3.1"
      auth_port      = 1812
      auth_type      = "PAP"
      disable        = false
      use_accounting = false
      use_mgmt_port  = false
      shared_secret  = "test"
    }
  ]
}

// Create TACACS+ Authservice with Additional Fields
resource "nios_security_tacacsplus_authservice" "tacacsplus_authservice_with_additional_field" {
  name = "tacacsplus_authservice2"
  servers = [
    {
      acct_port      = 1813
      address        = "2.2.3.1"
      auth_port      = 1812
      auth_type      = "PAP"
      disable        = false
      use_accounting = false
      use_mgmt_port  = false
      shared_secret  = "test"
    }
  ]
  comment      = "This is a commment"
  disable      = false
  acct_retries = 2
  acct_timeout = 2300
  auth_retries = 2
  auth_timeout = 7000
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The TACACS+ authentication service name.
- `servers` (Attributes List) The list of the TACACS+ servers used for authentication. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--servers))

### Optional

- `acct_retries` (Number) The number of the accounting retries before giving up and moving on to the next server.
- `acct_timeout` (Number) The accounting retry period in milliseconds.
- `auth_retries` (Number) The number of the authentication/authorization retries before giving up and moving on to the next server.
- `auth_timeout` (Number) The authentication/authorization timeout period in milliseconds.
- `comment` (String) The TACACS+ authentication service descriptive comment.
- `disable` (Boolean) Determines whether the TACACS+ authentication service object is disabled.

### Read-Only

- `ref` (String) The reference to the object.

<a id="nestedatt--servers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `servers`

Required:

- `shared_secret` (String) The secret key with which to connect to the TACACS+ server.

Optional:

- `address` (String) The valid IP address or FQDN of the TACACS+ server.
- `auth_type` (String) The authentication protocol.
- `comment` (String) The TACACS+ descriptive comment.
- `disable` (Boolean) Determines whether the TACACS+ server is disabled.
- `port` (Number) The TACACS+ server port.
- `use_accounting` (Boolean) Determines whether the TACACS+ accounting server is used.
- `use_mgmt_port` (Boolean) Determines whether the TACACS+ server is connected via the management interface.
